candidate_definition_hints.text: SenseTime Research platform for single object tracking, implementing algorithms like SiamRPN and SiamMask.

**PySOT** is a software system designed by SenseTime Video Intelligence Research team. It implements state-of-the-art single object tracking algorithms, including [SiamRPN](http://openaccess.thecvf.com/content_cvpr_2018/html/Li_High_Performance_Visual_CVPR_2018_paper.html) and […
